resource.name: GroupingIsInvalid
resource.object: Header groups or free format groups contain invalid groups for this report. Forbidden groups are: {0}

resource.name: dataTooMuch
resource.object: The report does only show {0} of the {1} returned rows.

resource.name: htoolUpdateYields
resource.object: Update yields for chosen products/yield groups

resource.name: htoolActivateYields
resource.object: Activate all yield changes in production

resource.name: actYieldColNotVisible
resource.object: Actual yield column is not visible

resource.name: htoolUpdateItemAllTimes
resource.object: Update item time for chosen product/s

resource.name: noProductSelectedForUpdAllMatTimes
resource.object: No product/s selected for updating item times

resource.name: ItemTaskTimeDivItemStandardTaskTime
resource.object: Time index (actual task time / std. task time)

resource.name: DateIntervalInvalid
resource.object: You must select at least {0} days of data

resource.name: axis_ItemTaskTimeDivItemStandardTaskTime
resource.object: Actual task time / standard task time (%)

resource.name: axis_InputTaskTimeDivInputStandardTaskTime
resource.object: Input task time / standard task time (%)
